title: Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio site showcasing my projects, skills, and experience.
moredes: A responsive personal portfolio built with React and custom CSS, deployed on Netlify, to present my projects, skills, and experience in one place.

title: Readme Exporter
description: Exports and translates README content into branded, printable formats.
moredes: A FastAPI-powered tool that converts README files into styled, branded documents, exporting to HTML, PDF, or DOCX, with built-in translation so documentation can be shared in multiple languages outside of GitHub.

title: Job Management System
description: Full-stack job board with AI-assisted candidate screening.
moredes: A full-stack job board platform built with React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL. Features JWT authentication, role-based access control, an admin dashboard, and AI-assisted candidate screening with a keyword-matching fallback.

title: Mindful Insights
description: Full-stack wellness platform with dashboards, collaboration, and analytics.
moredes: A full-stack wellness platform that helps teams track engagement, collaborate, and publish research through a clean, organized dashboard experience.

title: Shelter Management System
description: Shelter management system for pet adoption and surrender.
moredes: A Spring MVC web app where adopters can browse available pets and shelters can list animals for surrender, each with detailed, searchable profiles.

title: LifeLink
description: Platform connecting blood and organ donors with recipients.
moredes: A full-stack platform built with React, Node, and Express that matches donors and recipients by blood type and organ compatibility, streamlining donation availability and outreach.

title: Checkmate
description: Back-end task management API with role-based access.
moredes: A role-based task management API built with NestJS, PostgreSQL, and Docker, letting teams assign, track, and manage tasks through a structured backend service.

title: Smart Contract
description: Backend API for managing contracts from creation to expiration.
moredes: A contract management backend built with NestJS, TypeORM, and PostgreSQL, helping organizations create, track, and manage contracts through a structured, auditable lifecycle.

title: Mindful Insights UI
description: Figma UI for the Mindful Insights dashboard.
moredes: Figma UI design for Mindful Insights, focused on dashboard layouts, card components, and productivity-oriented flows.

title: Mindful Insights Login UI
description: Login screen UI concept for Mindful Insights.
moredes: A Figma concept for the Mindful Insights login screen, exploring branding and a clean authentication flow.

title: Prototype UI
description: UI prototype exploring layout and interaction design.
moredes: A Figma prototype focused on layout, interaction patterns, and component refinement.
